nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Hmm? Who are you to intrude into Plum Manor? But... seeing you carry the aura of Go mastery, you're an interesting person.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I am Hei Baizi, Second Master of Plum Manor. What I love most in life is studying Go books. The 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' is the world's greatest Go manual, which I've studied for years.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I see you're also a Go lover. Why not study this 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' with me? If you can solve its mysteries, I'll teach you a secret technique.

options.text: Senior, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Years ago, a master exhausted himself trying to solve a life-and-death Go problem, ultimately vomiting blood and dying. But the solution he left behind was earth-shattering.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: 'Blood-Vomiting Break' was comprehended from that manual - it can find a glimmer of hope in desperate situations, turning death into life. However, it requires extremely high Go skill and understanding.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Good! You have courage! But my Go skill is no empty reputation. If you want to learn this technique, you must play a game with me first.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I've studied the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' for years and know its dangers well. If you can beat me, it proves you have the understanding to comprehend this manual's essence.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Good! Let you witness the power of the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual'!

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Brilliant! Truly brilliant! Your game is divine - you already have the aptitude to solve the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual.' I'll teach you 'Blood-Vomiting Break.'

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: in desperate situations, find the way to break through, using one stone's power to reverse the situation. Limited to once per game with a 40-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Remember, 'in death ground, fight and live.' When using this technique, have the determination to burn your boats to unleash its maximum power.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Now that you've learned this technique, you can calmly handle difficult situations in the future. But remember, this technique harms the body and drains the spirit - don't abuse it.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your insights
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Your Go skill isn't enough yet. The essence of the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' can't be comprehended overnight - practice more.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I've spent my entire life studying Go manuals - one could say I'm obsessed to the point of madness. But it's precisely this obsession that allowed me to comprehend the true meaning of Go.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Playing Go is like comprehending the Way - it requires complete devotion. Though the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' is dangerous, the wisdom within is priceless.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Very well, come back when you're fully prepared. I'll be at Plum Manor, waiting anytime.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Go now and study the Way of Go well. I look forward to you solving the ultimate mystery of the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' in the future!
